response.justification: While Bogdan possesses extensive general software development experience (over 14 years) and strong modern development practices, he critically lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ experience, with only 6 months explicitly mentioned in a professional capacity. Furthermore, there is no demonstrable experience in Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Fixed Income domains, which are core requirements for this specialized role. His experience is primarily in web technologies and Dlang.
strengths: Extensive overall software development experience (14+ years).
Strong background in CI/CD, TDD, and modern development practices.
Proven ability to build scalable and high-performance systems.
concerns: Minimal professional C++ development experience (only 6 months mentioned).
No demonstrated domain expertise in Capital Markets or Fixed Income.
Lack of explicit experience with SQL Server or Oracle databases.
